name: Apple Corn Johnny Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornmeal, rice flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar in a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat egg whites until stiff.
3. Add egg yolks, oil, applesauce, and bacon to the dry ingredients. Stir well.
4. Fold in egg whites.
5. Pour batter into a greased 8x8 inch baking pan (or prepared muffin pan).
6. Bake at 425°F for 45 minutes or until an inserted knife comes out clean.
7. Serve warm with maple syrup or as a quickbread with soup or salad.
8. Serves 4-5.
